policy: Reference-only web inspiration. Bundled cover assets are generated from text prompts and must not include third-party original images, visible logos, people, trademarks, source footers, or consulting-firm identifiers.

assets.use_when: Technology implementation, platform architecture, enterprise systems, or technical transformation decks.
assets.license_notes: Self-generated bitmap. No third-party source image bundled.
assets.prompt_summary: Abstract strategic architecture cover visual with layered translucent planes, system architecture depth, and left-side negative space; no text, logos, people, or product UI.

assets.use_when: Market entry, growth strategy, capital allocation, portfolio review, or opportunity mapping decks.
assets.license_notes: Self-generated bitmap. No third-party source image bundled.
assets.prompt_summary: Abstract market growth and capital allocation cover visual with market terrain, opportunity zones, directional movement, and left-side negative space; no real map, text, logos, or people.

assets.use_when: Turnaround, operational improvement, process redesign, performance improvement, or execution acceleration decks.
assets.license_notes: Self-generated bitmap. No third-party source image bundled.
assets.prompt_summary: Abstract operations improvement cover visual with value stream flow, bottleneck release, and left-side negative space; no text, logos, people, safety signage, or recognizable equipment.

assets.use_when: Investment committee, M&A decision, due diligence, business case, or value creation decks.
assets.license_notes: Self-generated bitmap. No third-party source image bundled.
assets.prompt_summary: Abstract investment decision and value bridge cover visual with translucent valuation bridge blocks, scenario paths, and left-side negative space; no text, logos, people, currency symbols, or tickers.
